examples: Precision Telecentric lenses up to 100 magnifications.
Due to size and weight, mounting clamps are recommended for all Telecentric lenses.
Telecentric lens has parallel chief ray with its optical axis and is ideal for co-axial lighting.
The superior telecentric optical design improves image quality throughout the frame by passing on information about subjects to the sensor.
The Sigma DP1 Merrill boasts an exclusively designed, high-performance, telecentric 19mm F2.8 lens, which is the equivalent to a 28mm lens on a 35mm SLR camera.
